text:
- New `wiki_*` rig tools — read: `wiki_list`, `wiki_read`; mutating: `wiki_create`/`add_statement`/`revise_statement`/`remove_statement`, each taking `evidence: [{start,end}]`.
- Citation engine: line-number the transcript (same enumeration the slicer uses), mint `[^<5char-session>-<n>]`, Rust slices verbatim from the cited ranges → inserts the marker into the section prose → appends sliced text to per-wiki `_citations.log`.
